item.title: Usain Bolt, what a legend. You can tell a lot about a person from the way they treat support staff.
item.dc:creator: kenistod

item.title: Landon Reid (@and_mayhem_ensued_) – "I Love You Even Though You're Not White: The JD and Usha Vance Story” – A Little Golden Toilet Book about JD and Usha Vance
item.description: Landon Reid: My new little golden toilet book has officially entered the chat. "I Love You Even Though You're Not White: The JD and Usha Vance Story” – written and illustrated by me. Yes, it's tiny. Yes, it's gold. Yes, it lives perfectly beside your toilet where all great political reflection happens..This is satire. This is camp. This is me with a pen, a highlighter, and absolutely no supervision. Every illustration is hand-done, every page crafted with love.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: 21 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 203
item.description:
This is my boy Archie (tabby) & my girl Frankie (Siamese) on the night we brought them home. ~u/aloneinmyroom79
Puff Puff, the forlorn orange triangle, checking in. ~u/DField118
This was a hard one to learn. In the end I used probabilities, and it has worked out well.
Consolidate.
~u/UniGirl114 Thanks very much to the people that helped me out. I appreciate you all.

item.dc:creator: thebigbaka

item.title: Trust the process yields beautiful results
item.dc:creator: RoryBory

item.title: The save act failed
item.description: There was a lot of misinformation surrounding this, Republicans were trying to frame it as you need to just simply show ID to vote, and it was not just that, it was forcing people to get a passport in the United States and then the passport needing to have the last name match the birth certificate, which would’ve disenfranchise millions of women and people who may have changed their names in life, it’s never been about a simple ID. Most people already support a simple ID. The only way Republicans win is by prevent preventing people from voting.
item.dc:creator: wafflesdidit

item.title: Phone Clearing Dump (Mostly Gaming MEMES, That I Pulled From My Vault To Help You Get Trough Friday) #819
item.description:
1. She went to bard's college and is ashamed of it? She doesn't like magic?!
2. WTF?!
3
4. Somewhere out there some dev spent two years of their life tirelessly working on game, for it to just in on your backlog, while you to play Animal Crossing for the 1000th time
5
6. I wish I had a copy of OOunga-Bunga 24 (20 2024 B.C. that is)
7. How do we know they are not NPCs
8. Wish we could bring back all of these!
9. You ruined gaming!
10
11. Why Netflix, why?!?!?
12
13. Dang it! Just let me have fun!
14. Look at that cat's face!!!
Hello everyone! We are a two brother team and we are making a game inspired by the book Obedience to Authority as well as media such as Papers, Please and the show Severance. Here in Eastern Europe we have experience and past with harsh authority and authoritarianism. I mean look at our oppressive leftover architecture! I guess the subject has always interested me... "Why do good people follow evil orders?" Our game tests if you obey orders and how does your moral compass work (if at all). I invite you try it! Check out our Steam page and if you like the premise, please wishlist! ? https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment Have a happy Friday!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: It's even more impressive when you realize there's a delay between throwing the ball and triggering the sound

item.title: All news and media is now being fed to you by MAGA Republicans. Literally all of it. And they control censorship on almost all social media platforms, the vast majority of which are also owned by far right wing Trump supporters and zionists.
item.dc:creator: Freyja33

item.title: Justice is healing.
item.description: Malcolm X, when asked on if he feels the country is making progress (60 years ago). Edit: if you believe the knife never should have been put there in the first place, that is hypothetical wishing and is a slap in the face of justice. If you believe all men should be equal, that's color blind universalism and we encourage everyone to look into it. We also have posted MLK jrs thoughts on the dangers of feckless white moderates and how they are likely more dangerous than the klanners.
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: Kate Mulgrew Catherine Janeway statue in Bloomington IN
item.description:
Better than Iowa's Kirk statue
We should leave cups of coffee as tribute
Ima go see it this summer

item.title: What is happening?
item.description: Honestly, it's probably just a cast reunion on Tudyk's and Fillion's new podcast, but whatever. It'll still be nice to see them all interacting. EDIT: Found out that Adam Baldwin has apparently decided that they are a libertarian. Ugh. Now what does tiny octopus do with his hat?
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: Down with Cameras
item.description: https://www.aclu.org/news/privacy-technology/alpr-against-op-ed-writer?initms_aff=nat&initms_chan=pm&utm_medium=pm&initms=nat-dig-pm-awr-int-fb-social_feed-HEZ30%2B-spt-feed_FreeFutureKansasMan_20260218&utm_source=fb&utm_campaign=nat-dig-pm-awr-int&utm_content=fb-social_feed-HEZ30%2B-spt-feed_FreeFutureKansasMan_20260218&ms_aff=nat&ms_chan=pm&ms=nat-dig-pm-awr-int-fb-social_feed-HEZ30%2B-spt-feed_FreeFutureKansasMan_20260218&utm_term=pm-6875333608795-6916509139195&fbclid=IwdGRjcAQO6XhleHRuA2FlbQEwAGFkaWQAAAZKYCP4M3NydGMGYXBwX2lkDDM1MDY4NTUzMTcyOAABHoj2ggpsQkz5s5GDgUBUVFjpefwoUjCwzeBbTnGsOzQZ0cCQmmMCFaOSDWp6_aem_C4LyXhBpNr2qhb0H2chY3w&utm_id=6544987402995

item.title: The fallacy of nonviolence
item.description: Kwame Ture in the documentary The Black Power Mictape. To those that engage in color-blind universalism and wish for peaceful protest: remind oneself how MLK jrs endeavors ended. Why is Mr. True referring to Doctor King in the past tense?
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: I’m shocked! Well, not that shocked
item.description: Most viral edit: Link to the study that contains the data for this article: https://www.ahajournals.org/doi/full/10.1161/JAHA.125.046517?mod=ANLink Original post: I’m in this article, but not dead, yet. I’ve skipped doctor appointments because I didn’t have money, or insurance. If only there was some sort of subsidized national healthcare system that incentivized people to get routine medical care before things get too serious and cost thousands of dollars to treat. (Note: same as every other healthcare post I make about the lack of universal healthcare in America; downvote, block me and move on. I’m not interested in Fox News talking points about universal healthcare and wait times to see a doctor in Denmark)
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: Makoto Shinkai’s Hidden Sceneries: Rare Real-Life Comparisons You Might Have Missed.
item.description:
Everyone knows the staircase from 'Your Name', but as a fan, I wanted to find the quiet corners that make his movies feel so real.
I struggled so much to find this bridge. It’s one of the most iconic spots in 'Your Name', but I just couldn't give up on it.
Hodaka’s part-time job location—the Kuga Family office.
Hina's prayer for sunshine at Roppongi Hills. One of the most breathtaking real-life comparisons.
The accessory shop where Mitsuha, the main character of "Your Name.", works. Including Mitsuha at this shop, many characters from 'Your Name.' appear in 'Weathering with You.' Taki, Yotsuha, Tessie, and Sayaka are all there. It's the Shinkai Multiverse!
The exact spot where Suzume and Souta met for the first time. This is where the whole journey began.
This station has such a beautiful landscape.
This is a famous spot where three different train lines intersect. It’s a masterpiece of urban scenery.
It’s clearly an homage in the movie, but the location actually exists in real life. I've mapped out plenty of other 'pilgrimage' spots from his films. Check out the link in my bio to help plan your own Shinkai-inspired trip!
item.dc:creator: Animenture

item.title: Y’all wanna see some stuff I saved a few years ago? I heard this is how to get it off my phone. Round 23!
